name: pAce
description: Reverse-polarity variant of Ace-mNeon2 whose fluorescence increases during depolarization, enabling dual-polarity multiplexed voltage imaging in a single color channel.

kinetics.note: Amplitude-weighted mean of the bi-exponential fit at 22°C in spiking HEK cells: τ_on = 0.82×0.51 + 0.18×1.5 = 0.69 ms; τ_off = 0.78×0.61 + 0.22×3.2 = 1.18 ms (fast/slow components and amplitudes from Table S1).

dynamicRangeData.note: ΔF/F per 100 mV step in spiking HEK cells at 22°C (Table S1); main text reports 36.6 ± 0.7% ΔF/F per 120 mV step (n=11 cells)

ΔF/F₀ = 0.41 ± 0.14 for a 100-mV step (−70 to +30 mV, 100 ms) in ND7/23 cells under 1P wide-field illumination (470 nm LED, 10 mW/mm², 50 Hz), whole-cell voltage clamp. Measured alongside Jarvis (0.29) and JEDI-2P (−0.46).

ΔF/F read from the pAce (green) F-V trace between -70 mV (baseline 0) and +30 mV in the Janelia patch-assay F-V curve figure (1P widefield, -20 mV steps, n=7); full sweep -110 to +50 mV spans ~-13% to +50%.

sensitivityData.note: ΔF/F per single action potential in PPL1-γ2α'1 dopaminergic neurons in Drosophila (n=87 spikes)

ΔF/F₀ per AP = 0.43 ± 0.04 at 1 kHz acquisition in organotypic hippocampal slices under 1P wide-field illumination (470 nm LED, 16 mW/mm²). Rises with frame rate: 0.33 (0.5 kHz), 0.43 (1 kHz), 0.51 (2 kHz). Measured alongside Jarvis.
pAce: 19.9 ± 1.8% ΔF/F0 per AP in cultured rat hippocampal neurons, 1P epifluorescence, measured in the HVI+ paper as the spectrally similar green positive-going reference.
Median single-AP ΔF/F0 read from the pAce (green) boxplot in the Janelia patch-assay spike-detection figure (1P widefield, PatcherBot cultured neurons, n=7); box spans ~17-22%.

brightnessData.note: Resting fluorescence normalized to Ace-mNeon in HEK cells (Fig. S11A)

photostabilityData.note: From photobleaching curve in HEK cells under continuous illumination (Fig. S11B); pAce supported extended 30-min continuous imaging at ~5 mW/mm² with stable d' (Fig. S14)

pAce lost 80% of initial fluorescence (retained ~20%) under continuous 10 mW/mm² wide-field illumination in HeLa cells; measured as a reference alongside ElectraON/ElectraOFF in the mBaoJin GEVI paper

twoPhoton.note: Demonstrated 2P-compatible: scanless holographic 2P voltage imaging detected APs in organotypic slices and high-contrast AP detection in awake mouse cortex; FRET-opsin sensors showed improved performance with low-irradiance scanless illumination.
